description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:latest Docker image with a before_script that runs python -V, installs virtualenv via pip, creates a virtual environment in venv, and activates it. Cache the pip directory at .cache/pip and the virtual environment directory venv/, and set a variable PIP_CACHE_DIR to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache. Add a run job that executes python setup.py bdist_wheel then pip install dist/*, and publishes the built wheel files matching dist/*.whl as artifacts. Add a test job that runs python setup.py test. Both jobs inherit the before_script and run in the default stage.
